title: LynxArt Texture Pack
description: Realistic Minecraft Textures, 256, Natural look and easy on the eye. Looks great with shaders.
body:
Another realistic texture pack? Really? Well, why not. Ever since I started using packs I have been unsatisfied. Don't get me wrong, some are amazing, Patrix for one has always been an inspiration.

A lot of thought went into the making so far. I'm referring whenever possible to real life stuff but everything has to work together. 

The work is not finished but be assured that the texture pack will be updated every month, I'll even try to keep up with Mojang's new updates!
I'm open to ideas and suggestions. Come and chat in my Discord. Show me your builds or best seeds

Visit my YouTube channel [LynxArt-tp](https://www.youtube.com/@lynxart-tp) or become a member on my Patreon and get exclusives like access to my Discord, 3 extra texture packs: Bushy Leaves, Overlay and LABpbr [LynxArt Patreon](https://www.patreon.com/LynxArt170)

For a limited time people who become free members on my [Patreon](https://www.patreon.com/LynxArt170) page will have access to the Bushy pack!

Peace
